meta.title: Position Play
meta.description: Decide what to do based on your position.

blocks.content:
## Position Play

Same hand, different position, different decision. Tighten up early, open up late. Practice thinking about position with every hand you see!

blocks.title: Position Play
blocks.instructions: Decide what to do with your hand from the given position. Assume a standard 6-max game with no prior action (no raises before you) unless stated otherwise.
